# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release and Publish

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-*'

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  validate:
    name: Validate Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.get_version.outputs.version }}
      is_prerelease: ${{ steps.check_prerelease.outputs.is_prerelease }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Get version from tag
        id: get_version
        run: |
          VERSION=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Version: $VERSION"

      - name: Check if prerelease
        id: check_prerelease
        run: |
          if [[ "${{ steps.get_version.outputs.version }}" =~ ^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            echo "is_prerelease=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "is_prerelease=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Verify tag matches package version
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            PKG_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
            if [ "$PKG_VERSION" != "${{ steps.get_version.outputs.version }}" ]; then
              echo "Error: Tag version (${{ steps.get_version.outputs.version }}) does not match package.json version ($PKG_VERSION)"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi
          if [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
              PYPI_VERSION=$(grep -E '^version\s*=' pyproject.toml | sed -E 's/version\s*=\s*"(.*)"/\1/')
            else
              PYPI_VERSION=$(python setup.py --version)
            fi
            if [ "$PYPI_VERSION" != "${{ steps.get_version.outputs.version }}" ]; then
              echo "Error: Tag version (${{ steps.get_version.outputs.version }}) does not match Python package version ($PYPI_VERSION)"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

  build-node:
    name: Build Node Package
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate
    if: hashFiles('package.json') != ''
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run security audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
        if: hashFiles('package.json') != '' && contains(fromJson('["test"]'), 'test')

      - name: Build package
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Package tarball
        run: npm pack

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-package
          path: '*.tgz'
          retention-days: 1

  build-python:
    name: Build Python Package
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate
    if: hashFiles('setup.py', 'pyproject.toml') != ''
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install build dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install build twine wheel setuptools

      - name: Install package dependencies
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements-dev.txt; fi

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          if [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f setup.cfg ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then
            pip install pytest pytest-cov
            pytest --cov --cov-report=xml || true
          fi

      - name: Build package
        run: python -m build

      - name: Check package
        run: twine check dist/*

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-package
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 1

  create-release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [validate, build-node, build-python]
    if: always() && needs.validate.result == 'success' && (needs.build-node.result == 'success' || needs.build-node.result == 'skipped') && (needs.build-python.result == 'success' || needs.build-python.result == 'skipped')
    outputs:
      upload_url: ${{ steps.create_release.outputs.upload_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Generate changelog
        id: changelog
        run: |
          PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git describe --abbrev=0 --tags $(git rev-list --tags --skip=1 --max-count=1) 2>/dev/null || echo "")
          if [ -z "$PREVIOUS_TAG" ]; then
            CHANGELOG=$(git log --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" --no-merges)
          else
            CHANGELOG=$(git log ${PREVIOUS_TAG}..HEAD --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" --no-merges)
          fi
          echo "changelog<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "$CHANGELOG" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Download Node artifacts
        if: needs.build-node.result == 'success'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-package
          path: ./artifacts/node
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Download Python artifacts
        if: needs.build-python.result == 'success'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-package
          path: ./artifacts/python
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Create Release
        id: create_release
        uses: actions/create-release@v1
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ github.ref }}
          release_name: Release ${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}
          body: |
            ## Changes in ${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}
            
            ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changelog }}
            
            ## Installation
            
            ### npm
